title: Inverted Nether and End portals
description: Inverts the textures of the Nether and End portals.
body:
## Inverted Nether and End Portal

This resource pack inverts the textures of both Nether and End portal. It keeps the original Minecraft textures.

### Features
- Inverted End Portal Frame textures
- Inverted Obsidian texture
- Inverted Nether Portal Frame textures
- Invverted End Portal texture


### Compatibility
- Minecraft Java 1.20.2+
